creator: tkato@prontomail.ne.jp
text:
> Would you explain why?

Because those 'delegate' programs are unnecessary while
building/installing/running ImageMagick port.

Although Ghostscript should be given special treatment, other
delegates are just like plug-ins or helper applications for
Netscape/Mozilla Web browser. Since those ports have no
dependency to external programs, ImageMagick port should also
be as such.


-- 
KATO Tsuguru / tkato@prontomail.ne.jp
                             
Sent by Japanese ProntoMail
